title: Awards & Honors
intro: Recognition and distinctions received during my academic journey.

featured.title: ESO Early-Career Scientific Research Visit Programme
featured.desc: 4-month research visit at ESO, Garching, Germany with Dr. Francesca Primas on stellar spectroscopy, galactic archaeology, and data-driven models.

featured.title: International Research Program (RTP) Scholarship
featured.desc: Competitive RTP scholarship awarded for PhD studies.

featured.title: Chalmers Astrophysics and Space Sciences Summer Fellowship (CASSUM)
featured.org: Chalmers University of Technology & University of Virginia
featured.desc: Competitive 25,000 SEK summer fellowship to work on young stellar associations.

items.title: ESO Early-Career Scientific Research Visit Programme
items.desc: 4-month research visit at ESO, Garching, Germany with Dr. Francesca Primas on stellar spectroscopy, galactic archaeology, and data-driven models.

items.title: ASA Student Travel Assistance Scheme (ASA-STAS) Grant
Graduate Research Excellence Award
items.desc: Nominated by the School of Mathematical and Physical Sciences for excellence in academic and research performance.

items.title: International Research Program (RTP) Scholarship
items.desc: Competitive RTP scholarship awarded for PhD studies.

items.title: Chalmers Astrophysics and Space Sciences Summer Fellowship (CASSUM)
items.org: Chalmers University of Technology & University of Virginia
items.desc: Competitive 25,000 SEK summer fellowship to work on young stellar associations.

items.title: VSRP Research Fellowship
items.org: National Centre for Radio Astrophysics (NCRA) – TIFR
items.desc: Selected among 4 students nationally in India to work on Fast Radio Bursts. Scholarship amount: Rs. 30,000.

items.title: IASc–INSA–NASI Summer Research Fellowship
items.org: Indian Academy of Sciences, INSA & NASI
items.desc: Fellowship to conduct research on carbon-enhanced metal poor stars using high-resolution spectroscopy at the Indian Institute of Astrophysics, Bengaluru. Scholarship amount: Rs. 30,000.

items.title: NIUS Physics & Astronomy Camp
items.desc: Selected nationally on merit to attend the National Undergraduate Physics & Astronomy camp at TIFR, Mumbai.

items.title: DST-INSPIRE Scholarship
items.desc: National undergraduate merit scholarship. Total support awarded: Rs. 360,000.
